side_effects.description: Red burning before tan with lower potency batches

protocol_notes: Multiple purchases from different suppliers. Earlier purchase from Chang biofuscus ltd via DHL Express (2-day delivery) showed excellent potency with no burning. Recent purchases with 2+ week delivery times showed reduced potency, requiring higher doses and causing redness/burning. Notes hair darkening as marker of potency. Later received product from Harbin Jixianglong Biotech Co., Ltd with solid quality and great tan results in winter use.
